chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI H.C.A. No.360 of 2022 Aun Saieed Hashmi Versus Mst. Sadia Muhammad Zahoor & others Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on CMA 327/24 2. For orders on CMA 326/24 3. For orders on CMA 4522/23 4. For orders on office objection/reply at “A” 5. For hearing of main case. 6. For hearing of CMA 3520/22. Dated: 18.03.2024 Mr. Latif Ahmed holds brief for Mr. Kamal M. Khan for appellant. Mr. Imran Taj for respondents No.1 and 2. Mr. Umer Sikandar for respondent No.3. Mr. Ubaidullah Abro for respondent No.9/SBCA. Mr. Sandeep Malani, Assistant Advocate General. -.-.- Despite orders of this Court the appellant’s counsel has failed to appear today and Mr. Latif Advocate holding his brief had initially no idea where the appellant’s counsel has gone but then he stated that perhaps he is on his way to Lahore. As he was given a chance on the last date and today’s fixed date was given at his request he should have been here. He is also stated to be on general adjournment however the same was granted to him except date by Court matters and it is a date by Court matter. In the circumstances, instant High Court Appeal is dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed applications. Judge Judge
